chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-2762 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.12566/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 10.03.2025 Mr.Muhammad Din Qazi, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Asad Aftab Solangi, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) Learned counsel has impugned a notice herein, however, submits that the same shall be contested before the issuing Department. Learned counsel seeks that the notice may be adjudicated vide speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the respondent has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that this petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
